2nd_5.enEffectOfficial: Disable the clock of your opponent's Character card. Place this card in the Abyss when the turn of switching between daytime and night is ended.
2nd_5.note: Verified directly against the card image.

2nd_7.enEffectOfficial: While using this card, your attack power will always be your daytime attack power. Place this card in the Abyss at the end of the turn of your opponent plays an area enchantment.
2nd_7.note: Verified directly against the card image.

2nd_14.enEffectOfficial: If the Abyss has two or more cards of the darkness attribute, recover 20 HP.
2nd_14.note: Corrected after bilingual semantic audit and verified directly against the card image.

2nd_16.note: Corrected NIHA to NIRA and verified spacing directly against the card image.

2nd_22.enEffectOfficial: Attack +20 if the attribute of the character card used in the previous turn is electric.
2nd_22.note: Corrected after bilingual semantic audit and verified directly against the card image.

2nd_23.enEffectOfficial: Attack +40 if the attribute of the character card used in the previous turn is electric and the opponent's character card is flame or darkness.
2nd_23.note: The OCR box merged the English effect with the card number; verified directly against the card image.

2nd_24.enEffectOfficial: If the attribute of the character card used in the previous turn was electric and it is now night, choose a SEND TO POWER 1+ card from your opponent's Power Charger and place it at the bottom of your opponent's deck.
2nd_24.note: Corrected after bilingual semantic audit and verified directly against the card image.

3rd_23.enEffectOfficial: Attack +40 if all the cards in the opponent's Power Charger are of the flame attribute.
3rd_23.note: Removed the truncated name and corrected ff to if in the effect; verified directly against the card image.

3rd_50.note: Verified punctuation directly against the card image.

3rd_74.note: Verified punctuation and spacing directly against the card image.

4th_2.enEffectOfficial: Select up to 2 characters from the Power Charger (SHADE) and use their effects.
4th_2.note: Corrected the effect subject and verified directly against the card image.

4th_6.enEffectOfficial: Select 4 cards from the Abyss. Shuffle them face down and place them at the bottom of your deck. Otherwise, you lose the game. Then, select 1 character from the opponent's Power Charger, swap it with a character in the Battle Zone. The effects of the character brought into the Battle Zone by this effect are not triggered.
4th_6.note: Verified directly against the card image.

4th_9.enEffectOfficial: If there are 3 or more cards in your Abyss, opponent's Character gains -30 Attack.
4th_9.note: Verified directly against the card image.

4th_11.enEffectOfficial: Attack +50 if the opponent's Abyss has no cards.
4th_11.note: Verified directly against the card image.

4th_14.enEffectOfficial: Attack +60 if all cards in your Power Charger are darkness attribute.
4th_14.note: Verified directly against the card image.

4th_10.note: Removed the Japanese title line merged by OCR; verified directly against the card image.

4th_23.enEffectOfficial: Attack -100 if you swapped with a (STUDY ME) character this turn.
4th_23.note: Preserved the printed English -100 even though the official Japanese rule says +100; verified directly against the card image.

4th_24.enEffectOfficial: Attack +110 if you swapped with a (STUDY ME) character this turn. Damage dealt by this character cannot be reduced.
4th_24.note: Verified punctuation and spacing directly against the card image.

4th_30.enEffectOfficial: Attack +40 if there are no cards in your opponent's Abyss. When a card is placed in the opponent's Abyss, immediately place this card in the Abyss.
4th_30.note: Corrected after bilingual semantic audit and verified directly against the card image.

4th_31.enEffectOfficial: Attack +100 if there are 4 or more attributes in the Power Charger.
4th_31.note: Corrected the OCR wording and verified directly against the card image.

4th_68.note: Removed the Japanese title line merged by OCR; verified directly against the card image.
